creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

Fails here: 

cc -O -pipe  -g       -I/usr/X11R6/include   -DCSRG_BASED     -DFUNCPROTO=15 -DNARROWPROTO    -c atom.c 
rm -f xmotd 
cc -o xmotd -g      -L/usr/X11R6/lib main.o xmotd.o changed.o textmode.o usage.o browser.o logo.o atom.o       -lXaw -lXmu -lXt -lSM -lICE -lXpm -lXext -lX11      -Wl,-rpath,/usr/X11R6/lib 
/usr/X11R6/lib/libXaw.so: warning: tmpnam() possibly used unsafely; consider using mkstemp() 
make: don't know how to make xmotd.man. Stop 
*** Error code 2 

I'm not interested in figuring out how to fix this, since NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES 
didn't work.  :)
